sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87346" key="proecileo/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεξ-ῑλεόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n87346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">propitiate before,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sostrat.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.20.72</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
